creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dan Langille from comment #19)
My proposed change:

[dvl@ava-pkg-02prd:/usr/dvl/main/security/vuxml] $ git diff
diff --git a/security/vuxml/vuln/2023.xml b/security/vuxml/vuln/2023.xml
index bb2dc0d3af58..da3e9b12e7c1 100644
--- a/security/vuxml/vuln/2023.xml
+++ b/security/vuxml/vuln/2023.xml
@@ -335,7 +335,7 @@
        <name>py37-viewvc-devel</name>
        <name>py38-viewvc-devel</name>
        <name>py39-viewvc-devel</name>
-       <range><lt>1.3.0-20230104</lt></range>
+       <range><lt>1.3.0.20230104</lt></range>
       </package>
     </affects>
     <description>
